settings.heading: A private discovery journey to your signature scent.
Our Offering
settings.content: A dedicated session, with our senior scent consultant translating who you are into a scent that is unmistakably you. Our team operates internationally and entirely on your terms: your space, your schedule.

settings.heading: Tailored Experience
settings.content: Our consultants move with utmost care to understand who you are at your core and guide you through a customized session to uncover your desires in enhancing your unique personality. Our highly personalized curation ensures a level of exclusivity that simply cannot be replicated by commercial stores.

settings.heading: Our Promise
settings.content: We vow to find the perfect match for our clients every time, and help them elevate their self-expression. Scent is identity, and our signature sessions unveil yours — to accompany you in all stages of life.

settings.heading: Find your olfactive signature with soul of scents.
settings.subheading: Request a senior consultant to get in touch.
settings.success_message: Thank you. A senior consultant will be in touch shortly.

settings.heading: Frequently asked questions
settings.q1: Who is the Signature Session for?
settings.a1: Anyone seeking a fragrance that genuinely reflects them rather than a trend. Whether you're new to fragrance or a long-time collector, our consultants build a profile that captures your personality and stage of life.
settings.a2: After you submit the form, a senior consultant gets in touch to schedule a private session at a time and place that suits you — in person where possible, or virtually. Pricing is discussed during this conversation.
settings.a3: Internationally. Our consultants travel for in-person sessions in major cities and offer guided virtual sessions worldwide.
settings.q4: What can I expect from the session itself?
settings.a4: A guided conversation about your lifestyle, memories, and aesthetic preferences, followed by a curated set of fragrances to explore together. Each session ends with one or more recommendations tailored exactly to you.
settings.a5: Pricing is upon request because each session is bespoke. We discuss it during the introductory call so you know exactly what to expect before we proceed.
